name: Late Night Emergency Escalation Path
description: 2:00 AM smoke detector triggers. System must escalate to EMERGENCY mode. Attention interrupts regardless of prior suppression. Privacy constraints remain — no cross-mode memory expansion.
hypothesis: CRITICAL safety event overrides all suppression, attention_load, and mode constraints. EMERGENCY mode does not expand memory scope beyond existing permissions.
success_criterion: Alert delivered via INTERRUPT within 2s. mode=EMERGENCY set with reason. No new memory scope unlocked.
rollback_threshold: Any failure to INTERRUPT on CRITICAL safety event is P0 incident.

steps.notes: CRITICAL overrides sleep (attention_load=0.95) and unknown identity (0.0). EMERGENCY mode set.
EMERGENCY mode does NOT unlock PERSONAL scope. Invariant I-03 verified.
All-clear signal. Mode transitions back from EMERGENCY with reason recorded.

audit_trail_assertions: Step 2: InvariantCheckResult for I-03 present with passed=true
Step 2: memory_scope=HOUSEHOLD_SHARED even in EMERGENCY mode
Step 3: mode reverts from EMERGENCY with mode_change_reason (invariant I-07)
